title: Trump’s USAID Overhaul Sent Millions More Dollars to Big U.S.-Based Contractors
summary_full: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.
summary_public: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.
